tweets.text:
HARLINGEN, Texas — A weeklong immigration enforcement operation led to 72 arrests in Texas, including:
⚠️2 documented gang members
⚠️61 criminal aliens

💻Learn more about the operation & see more photos in our newsroom. 👇 https://t.co/Sz1cMlrhEl

tweets.text:
📰ICE Detroit arrested Alberto Mancuso Lopez, a child rapist from Argentina. We don’t take chances when it comes to our children — his victim was under 13 years old!

🔍He was sentenced to one year in prison after a plea deal was reached. We didn’t want him back on the streets, so ICE picked him up for violating immigration law.

💻Read the 2024 plea announcement from the prosecutor’s office: https://t.co/M8aoU9hj8Z
tweets.text_resolved:
📰ICE Detroit arrested Alberto Mancuso Lopez, a child rapist from Argentina. We don’t take chances when it comes to our children — his victim was under 13 years old!

tweets.text:
NEWARK, N.J. — Ming Xi Zhang was convicted of secretly acting as an agent of a foreign government.

🔍The U.S. District Court for the District of New Jersey sentenced him April 30, 2024, to 3 years of probation. We arrested him this week. He remains in ICE custody.

📰Learn more in our newsroom.

tweets.text:
ICE offers 3 partnership models to police depts:
• Jail Enforcement — identify & process removable aliens
• Task Force — use limited immigration enforcement authority
• Warrant Service Officer — serve & execute admin. warrants on aliens in custody
💻https://t.co/qxQ7iwBXnv https://t.co/t9eLJY4l6H
